name: let-with-effectful-body-rejected
expect: !{:origin :qlang/eval :kind :effect-laundering :thrown :EffectLaunderingAtLetParse :message "let 'foo' has an effectful body (references '@callers') but its name is not @-prefixed; rename to '@foo' or remove the effectful reference" :letName "foo" :effectfulName "@callers"}

name: let-with-nested-effectful-body-rejected
expect: !{:origin :qlang/eval :kind :effect-laundering :thrown :EffectLaunderingAtLetParse :message "let 'foo' has an effectful body (references '@callers') but its name is not @-prefixed; rename to '@foo' or remove the effectful reference" :letName "foo" :effectfulName "@callers"}

name: let-with-projection-laundering-rejected
expect: !{:origin :qlang/eval :kind :effect-laundering :thrown :EffectLaunderingAtLetParse :message "let 'bad' has an effectful body (references '@callers') but its name is not @-prefixed; rename to '@bad' or remove the effectful reference" :letName "bad" :effectfulName "@callers"}

name: transitive-laundering-via-alias-rejected
expect: !{:origin :qlang/eval :kind :effect-laundering :thrown :EffectLaunderingAtLetParse :message "let 'b' has an effectful body (references '@a') but its name is not @-prefixed; rename to '@b' or remove the effectful reference" :letName "b" :effectfulName "@a"}

name: let-inside-paren-group-with-effectful-body-rejected
expect: !{:origin :qlang/eval :kind :effect-laundering :thrown :EffectLaunderingAtLetParse :message "let 'bad' has an effectful body (references '@callers') but its name is not @-prefixed; rename to '@bad' or remove the effectful reference" :letName "bad" :effectfulName "@callers"}
